residents.name: Ava
residents.biography: Ava manages the market stalls and usually knows what the town is running short on.
memorySummary: Helped stabilize the market after a late-spring shortage.
Trusts Rowan when inventory numbers matter.

residents.name: Rowan
residents.biography: Rowan runs the bakery and unintentionally becomes a rumor hub during lunch rush.
memorySummary: Turned the festival crowd into the best sales day of the season.
Keeps a soft alliance with Ava because flour deliveries affect both shops.

residents.name: Soren
residents.biography: Soren keeps the workshop and power lines running and dislikes avoidable chaos.
memorySummary: Fixed the water pump during a storm blackout.
Keeps a wary eye on gossip that disrupts work routines.

residents.name: Lyra
residents.biography: Lyra keeps lessons and evening reading circles alive in the town library.
memorySummary: Mediated a disagreement between young workers during autumn clean-up.
Believes the town's health depends on shared stories.

residents.name: Tamsin
residents.biography: Tamsin works the clinic and notices small shifts in town stress before most people do.
memorySummary: Tracked a fever cluster during a wet week.
Trusts Lyra to calm people before panic spreads.

residents.name: Cass
residents.biography: Cass repairs homes and public structures and takes town maintenance personally.
memorySummary: Rebuilt the square stage after a storm.
Sometimes clashes with Miles over whether image or durability matters more.

residents.name: Jules
residents.biography: Jules moves goods and news between town corners faster than anyone else.
memorySummary: Spread a market rumor that turned out half true and half damaging.
Knows who met whom more often than who planned what.

residents.name: Elin
residents.biography: Elin archives letters, old maps, and the small personal histories people leave behind.
memorySummary: Built the first memory ledger for town events.
Prefers evidence to drama but secretly enjoys both.

residents.name: Orin
residents.biography: Orin tends the south garden and notices environmental shifts before anyone else.
memorySummary: Tracked blight signs before they reached the market.
Believes town mood changes with weather more than people admit.

residents.name: Mira
residents.biography: Mira measures the town through reputation, aesthetics, and who is winning attention.
memorySummary: Used a festival wardrobe change to shift public mood after a tense week.
Understands social standing almost as an economy.

residents.name: Noa
residents.biography: Noa works the pond dock and keeps one foot in town life and one foot outside it.
memorySummary: Warned the clinic about a bad water patch after heavy rain.
Dislikes rushed decisions made in crowded rooms.

residents.name: Miles
residents.biography: Miles keeps trying to turn the town's informal exchanges into more deliberate deals.
memorySummary: Profit-minded during shortages but knows how quickly that can backfire.
Often sees coordination as leverage.

residents.name: Nia
residents.biography: Nia handles shared plots and keeps the gardens more communal than private.
memorySummary: Turned a harvest dispute into a work-sharing compromise.
Knows who actually helps when labor gets heavy.

residents.name: Vale
residents.biography: Vale monitors the paths, tree line, and pond edge and dislikes disruptions that spread quietly.
memorySummary: Tracked nighttime movement during a rumor spiral.
Believes town danger often starts as a pattern, not an event.

residents.name: Iris
residents.biography: Iris supports the clinic with gathered herbs and keeps a detailed memory of seasonal patterns.
memorySummary: Prevented a medicine shortage by storing dried herbs early.
Remembers who listens when quiet warnings are given.

residents.name: Dane
residents.biography: Dane works metals, repairs tools, and treats breakage like a moral failure.
memorySummary: Kept tools flowing during the last planting crunch.
Finds gossip tolerable only when it predicts real maintenance problems.

residents.name: Pia
residents.biography: Pia runs the cafe like an emotional pressure valve for the whole town.
memorySummary: Calmed a near-fight by reorganizing seating during market rush.
Tracks town tension through what people stop saying.

residents.name: Kellan
residents.biography: Kellan builds walls, paths, and foundations, and thinks long-term by default.
memorySummary: Argued that shortcuts in public works always become someone else's burden later.
Respects Cass more when plans survive weather.

residents.name: Bryn
residents.biography: Bryn is not formally in charge of anything, which somehow makes them influential everywhere.
memorySummary: Can turn town history into motivation or panic depending on the moment.
Knows that narratives shape alliances as much as facts.

residents.name: Hel
residents.biography: Hel repairs clocks, keeps schedule boards accurate, and dislikes temporal drift in a town.
memorySummary: Knows exactly how often routines break after storm days.
Treats lateness as a signal, not a flaw.

residents.name: Odin
residents.biography: Odin maintains the dock structures and watches resource flow through the pond edge.
memorySummary: Tracks supply bottlenecks through transport rather than markets.
Prefers fewer promises and better tools.

residents.name: Lark
residents.biography: Lark is unofficially responsible for town coordination because everyone keeps sending them somewhere.
memorySummary: Knows which routes fail when weather turns.
Carries more social context than any formal document.

residents.name: Finn
residents.biography: Finn thinks about the town in terms of pollination, balance, and invisible dependencies.
memorySummary: Sees small environmental drift before others notice social drift.
Treats town harmony as an ecosystem property.

residents.name: Vesper
residents.biography: Vesper works nights and therefore understands a different Duckertown than the daytime residents do.
memorySummary: Night movement patterns say a lot about stress and secrecy.
Believes every town has a second shift personality.

residents.name: Esme
residents.biography: Esme keeps small public goods in order and notices who quietly falls through town routines.
memorySummary: Tracks invisible social maintenance like cleaning, care, and check-ins.
Knows that towns fail slowly before they fail loudly.

residents.name: Quill
residents.biography: Quill writes formal notices and keeps institutional memory from dissolving into gossip.
memorySummary: Differentiates what the town remembers from what it merely repeats.
Suspicious of any story that spreads faster than evidence.

residents.name: Hale
residents.biography: Hale tracks the grain chain behind the bakery and market and therefore sees scarcity early.
memorySummary: Measures town fragility through missing inputs, not speeches.
Knows when a shortage is logistical rather than agricultural.

residents.name: Sel
residents.biography: Sel affects town mood more than formal power and often softens hard edges through atmosphere.
memorySummary: Can shift a public space from tense to warm in under ten minutes.
Treats emotion as infrastructure.
